name: Bavarian Apple Torte
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Apples, fresh, peeled, cored, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine margarine, sugar and 1 cup flour. Pat into an 8-inch square pan.
2. In a separate bowl, beat together the cream cheese, egg, and 1/4 cup sugar until smooth.
3. Add vanilla extract to the cream cheese mixture and stir well.
4. Pour the creamy filling over the pastry crust in the pan.
5. In another bowl, mix together 1/2 cup sugar and cinnamon with the sliced apples.
6. Spread the apple-cinnamon mixture evenly over the top of the cream cheese layer.
7. Bake at 450°F (232°C) for 10 minutes.
8. Reduce the oven temperature to 400°F (204°C) and continue baking for an additional 25 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
Note: Do not use aggressive culinary slang in preparation instructions.
